source_note: Florida PSC Order No. PSC-2023-0342-FOF-EG (Final Order), Docket No. 20230002-EG, 'Energy conservation cost recovery clause', issued November 16, 2023 (9 pp) — the Commission's annual review of energy-conservation / demand-side-management program cost recovery, approving the conservation cost-recovery amounts, tariffs, and factors for January–December 2024 for Florida's investor-owned utilities. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: Florida PSC document clerk, document 06084-2023 (psc.state.fl.us/library/Orders/2023/06084-2023.pdf).
